basic_details.job_title: ALIMCO Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 89 ITI, Diploma Apprentices Posts
basic_details.job_category: Miniratna – Central PSU, Govt. of India
basic_details.post_name: Apprenticeship Trainees (ITI & Diploma) under Apprenticeship Act, 1961
basic_details.short_information: ALIMCO Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026–27: Get latest ALIMCO apprenticeship notification 2026 for 89 Apprenticeship Trainee vacancies (74 ITI + 15 Diploma) under the Apprenticeship Act, 1961 at Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India (ALIMCO), a Miniratna Central PSU under the Government of India. The offline application process is open now and the last date for receipt of application by Speed Post / Registered Post / Courier at ALIMCO Kanpur is 11th May 2026 (applications received after this date will not be accepted under any circumstances). Find ALIMCO Apprenticeship vacancies,

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated by Registered Post / Email to shortlisted candidates (at least 21 days prior to interview date)

age_limit.details: The minimum age for all candidates is 18 years and the maximum age is 25 years, calculated as on 01.04.2026. Candidates below 18 years or above 25 years as on the cut-off date will not be eligible. Age relaxation is provided to reserved category candidates as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Class (with Science & Maths, minimum 50%) under 10+2 system or equivalent
qualification.experience: Candidates with 1 year or more of work experience are NOT eligible
qualification.details: All candidates must be Indian Citizens. The minimum educational requirement for ITI candidates is passing Class 10 (with Science and Mathematics) under the 10+2 system with a minimum of 50% marks, along with an NCVT or SCVT certificate in the relevant trade with minimum 50% marks, issued for a period of one year or more. | For Diploma candidates, the requirement is Class 10 (with Science and Mathematics, minimum 50%) plus a full-time Diploma (Polytechnic) certificate with minimum 50% marks, issued by UGC/AICTE/State Government/Central Government recognised institution. | Diploma candidates must have passed in the years 2022, 2023, 2024, or 2025 only, as per BOAT guidelines. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training under the Apprenticeship Act, 1961 at any government, public sector, or private industrial establishment are not eligible. Candidates with one year or more of work experience after their qualifying examination are also not eligible. A valid PAN Card issued by the Income Tax Department, Government of India, is mandatory for all candidates. | ITI Candidates – Eligibility Summary | Diploma Candidates – Eligibility Summary

salary_details.monthly stipend: As prescribed by Govt. of India under Apprenticeship Act, 1961 / Apprenticeship Rules, 1992 (revised from time to time)
salary_details.training hours: As per ALIMCO working hours (9:00 AM to 5:30 PM)
salary_details.leave: As per Apprenticeship Act and Apprenticeship Rules
salary_details.regular employment: ALIMCO is NOT obligated to provide regular employment after completion of apprenticeship

selection_process: Stage 1: Application Screening Applications screened for eligibility, completeness, and portal registration. Incomplete or unsigned applications will be rejected.
Stage 2: Shortlisting Based on percentage of marks in qualifying ITI/Diploma examination and other applicable trade-specific criteria.
Stage 3: Interview Shortlisted candidates called for interview before the Selection Committee. Call letters sent at least 21 days in advance by Registered Post / Email.
Stage 4: Document Verification Original documents verified at the time of selection/joining as per the checklist. Medical fitness certificate required from a Government hospital.
For Technical Trades For Non-Technical Trades
One officer from PD Department (not below E-1 grade) One officer from Materials Management Department (not below E-1 grade)
One officer from the department where apprentice is to be trained One officer from the department where apprentice is to be trained
One officer from Personnel & Administration Department One officer from Personnel & Administration Department
One officer representing SC/ST/OBC (not below E-1 grade) One officer representing SC/ST/OBC (not below E-1 grade)

The selection of apprentices will be done through a formal interview conducted by a Selection Committee constituted as per the Guidelines for Engagement of Apprenticeship Training approved by the Board of Directors. The Selection Committee will evaluate candidates on the basis of their academic/technical qualifications
and performance in the interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their percentage of marks in the qualifying ITI/Diploma examination and other applicable parameters for the relevant trade.

A Common Merit List will be prepared by the Selection Committee and submitted for approval by the competent authority. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview at least 21 days in advance through Registered Post / Speed Post / Courier / Email. Selected candidates will be informed by Registered Post / Email
and the list will also be hosted on the ALIMCO website. Reservation for apprentices will be as per Section 5 of the Apprenticeship Rules
how_to_apply: The application process is entirely offline - no hand delivery or email applications will be accepted. Candidates must download the prescribed application form from the ALIMCO website (www.alimco.in) - there are separate forms for ITI candidates and Diploma (Polytechnic) candidates. The form must be filled carefully with accurate information, signed by the candidate, and sent along with all required self-attested document copies by Speed Post / Registered Post / Courier to reach ALIMCO on or before 11/05/2026.

ITI candidates must register on the Apprenticeship India portal (www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) and also apply to the ALIMCO establishment on the portal before submitting the application. Diploma candidates must register on the NATS portal (www.nats.education.gov.in) and apply to the ALIMCO establishment there.

The registration/profile number and a photocopy of the portal registration profile must be enclosed with the application - applications without portal registration details will be rejected. No original documents should be attached; only self-attested photocopies are to be submitted.
Download the appropriate application form (ITI or Diploma) from www.alimco.in.
ITI candidates: Register on www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in and apply to ALIMCO establishment on the portal.
Diploma candidates: Register on www.nats.education.gov.in and apply to ALIMCO establishment on the portal.
Fill the application form in clear letters, sign it, and attach the portal registration number and profile photocopy.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents. Do NOT attach original documents.
Send by Speed Post / Registered Post / Courier to the address below, to reach on or before 11/05/2026.
Send Application to: Senior Manager (Personnel & Administration) Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India G.T. Road, Naramau, Kanpur – 209217
important_instructions: Candidates are advised to read the full notification and Guidelines for Engagement of Apprenticeship Training available on www.alimco.in before applying. Incomplete applications, applications without the candidate's signature, or applications without the portal registration details will be rejected outright. ALIMCO is not responsible for postal delays, non-delivery, or loss of application in transit - candidates must dispatch applications well in advance. Only one application per candidate should be submitted. ALIMCO reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process and its notification at any stage without assigning any reason.

Apprenticeship trainees are not employees of the Corporation - they are trainees under the Apprenticeship Act. ALIMCO is not obligated to provide regular employment after completion of the apprenticeship. Concealment of facts at any stage of the selection process will lead to immediate disqualification. All management decisions regarding eligibility, selection, partial or complete cancellation of the process are final and binding, and no correspondence will be entertained in this regard.

Application must be sent only by Speed Post / Registered Post / Courier. Hand delivery and email applications will not be accepted. Do not attach original documents with the application - only self-attested photocopies. Portal registration (www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in for ITI / www.nats.education.gov.in for Diploma) is mandatory. Application without it will be rejected. Candidates must sign the application form and all attached photocopies. No separate communication will be sent by ALIMCO. Keep visiting www.alimco.in for updates. Completion of apprenticeship does not guarantee regular employment at ALIMCO.

faq.question: Q1. What is ALIMCO Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026–27?
faq.answer: ALIMCO Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026–27 is a training engagement drive for 89 Apprenticeship Trainee posts (74 ITI and 15 Diploma) under the Apprenticeship Act, 1961 at Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India, a Miniratna Central PSU.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released in ALIMCO Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 89 vacancies have been notified, out of which 74 seats are for ITI trade apprentices and 15 seats are for full‑time Diploma (Polytechnic) apprentices in various disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for ALIMCO Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of the duly filled offline application form by Speed Post / Registered Post / Courier at ALIMCO Kanpur is 11 May 2026; applications reaching after this date will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What are the ITI trades available in ALIMCO Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ITI apprenticeship seats are available in trades such as Fitter, Electrician, Electronics Mechanic, Machinist, Turner, Welder, Mechanic Machine Tool Maintenance, Plumber, COPA, Sheet Metal Worker, and Plastic Processing Operator.

faq.question: Q5. Which Diploma disciplines are included in ALIMCO Diploma Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Diploma apprenticeship positions are offered in Computer Science / IT, Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Modern Office Management & Secretarial Practice.

faq.question: Q6. What is the eligibility criteria for ALIMCO ITI Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Indian citizens, have passed Class 10 with Science and Mathematics securing at least 50% marks, and possess an NCVT/SCVT ITI certificate in the relevant trade with minimum 50% marks and duration of one year or more.

faq.question: Q7. What is the eligibility criteria for ALIMCO Diploma Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Diploma applicants must be Indian citizens, have passed Class 10 with Science and Mathematics with minimum 50% marks, and hold a full‑time Diploma (Polytechnic) with at least 50% marks from a recognised institute, normally within the recent approved passing years as per BOAT guidelines.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for ALIMCO Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age of the candidate should be between 18 and 25 years as on 01 April 2026, with upper age relaxations for OBC, SC/ST, and PwD categories as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for ALIMCO Apprenticeship 2026 ITI & Diploma posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must first register on the relevant apprenticeship portal (Apprenticeship India for ITI or NATS for Diploma), then download the prescribed application form from www.alimco.in, fill it carefully, attach self‑attested documents and portal registration printout, and send it by post to ALIMCO Kanpur before 11 May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any guarantee of permanent job after ALIMCO apprenticeship training?
faq.answer: No, apprenticeship trainees at ALIMCO are engaged only for one‑year training under the Apprenticeship Act, 1961, and the Corporation is not obligated to offer regular employment after successful completion of the training period.
